name: Balsamic Baked Beets with Hazelnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Toast hazelnuts in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, until skins start to crack.
3. Remove from oven and let cool slightly. Rub the nuts against a kitchen towel to remove skins, then chop coarsely.
4. Wrap beets in aluminum foil and place on a baking sheet. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
5. Bake beets for 45-50 minutes, until just tender.
6. Cool enough to handle, peel and slice thinly.
7. In a small jar, combine vinegar and olive oil. Pour over the beets.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Beets can be eaten warm or marinated in the refrigerator several hours.
10. Just before serving, stir in nuts and parsley.
Per serving: 93 cal; 2g pro, 7g fat (66%), 7g carb, 82mg sodium
